name: Bioinformatics Pipeline Development Gantt with Sprints
input: Create a Gantt chart for developing a bioinformatics analysis pipeline. Title: 'Bioinformatics Pipeline Development Plan'. Sections: Sprint 1 — Foundation (Requirements gathering 2024-01-08 to 2024-01-19, Data model design 2024-01-22 to 2024-02-02, FastQ preprocessing module 2024-02-05 to 2024-02-23, Sprint 1 review milestone 2024-02-23). Sprint 2 — Core Analysis (Alignment module after FastQ preprocessing, 3 weeks. Variant calling module after Alignment module, 2 weeks. QC metrics dashboard after Alignment module, 2 weeks. Sprint 2 review milestone after Variant calling). Sprint 3 — Integration (Pipeline orchestration after Variant calling module and QC metrics dashboard, 3 weeks. Benchmarking suite after Pipeline orchestration, 2 weeks. Documentation after Pipeline orchestration, 2 weeks. v1.0 release milestone after Benchmarking suite and Documentation). Use 'after' dependencies extensively.
qualityCriteria: At least 3 milestone markers present (sprint reviews, release)
Bioinformatics terms present (FastQ, alignment, variant calling)
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Gantt with 3 sprints, 3+ milestones, 10+ tasks, extensive 'after' dependencies, bioinformatics pipeline.
